rationale: Improvement removing deprecated save() for CRUD spec compliance; no specific spec rule prohibiting save() cited.

SPEC-1515 test requires error when username given without password for MONGODB-AWS; driver fails to return expected error.
Spec says MONGODB-AWS auth source MUST be '$external'; driver returns 'admin', failing connection string spec tests.
API signature fix: const-correctness of server description host pointer; no spec involvement.
Removing deprecated mongoc_cursor_is_alive function; no description, no spec involvement.
Removing flawed minPoolSize option in 2.0 release; internal API cleanup, no spec rule violation.
Removing deprecated mongoc_client_kill_cursor; no description, no spec involvement.
Removing automatic init/cleanup; no description, internal API change with no spec involvement.
Description explicitly says 'Contradicting the Bulk API spec, the driver allows multiple calls to mongoc_bulk_operation_execute'.
Removing BSON_EXTRA_ALIGNMENT causing alignment issues; internal build cleanup, no spec involvement.
Bug split from DRIVERS-2915: driver allows comma in authMechanismProperties contrary to connection string spec.
Adding __cdecl to bson memory function pointers for ABI correctness on Windows; no spec involvement.
Missing __cdecl on mongoc_log_func_t typedef causes linker errors; build/ABI issue, no spec involvement.
Prohibiting option mutation on pooled clients to prevent config contamination; internal API safety, no spec rule cited.
Removing redundant libmongoc-ssl-1.0.pc pkg-config alias; packaging cleanup, no spec involvement.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-3058; proactive spec rollout implementing new resumeToken stability requirement.
Fixing Windows format warning in build; compiler warning fix, no spec involvement.
Spec says 'MUST NOT populate partialResult if no write succeeded'; driver populates it after client-side error in first operation.
Auth spec requires RFC2253-format X509 username; Windows SChannel prepends extra comma, causing authentication failure.
Auth spec requires RFC2253 RDN order for X509 username; macOS SecureTransport derives reversed order, causing auth failure.
Adding cluster time gossip to unified test runner (Unified Test Runner component); Issue split from DRIVERS-2816.
Auth failures logged at DEBUG instead of ERROR/CRITICAL; no logging spec rule about auth failure severity cited.
Fixing bson_strerror_r error message formatting on Windows; internal string handling, no spec involvement.
Investigating PCCERT_CONTEXT memory leak in Windows TLS setup; internal resource management, no spec rule.
Upgrading tornado Python dependency to fix Dependabot security alerts; dependency management, no spec involvement.
Improving error messages from Windows APIs; UX improvement, no spec involvement.
Reducing miscellaneous MSVC compiler warnings; build quality improvement, no spec involvement.
Windows SChannel cannot load PKCS#8 private keys; TLS library limitation, no spec rule specifies key format support.
Adding auto encryption support to unified test runner (Unified Test Runner component); Issue split from DRIVERS-3106.
BSON_VALIDATE_UTF8 flag has no effect; bson_validate reports success for invalid UTF-8 strings, violating BSON spec.

Preventing multi-evaluation of arithmetic macro operands; internal C preprocessor correctness, no spec involvement.
Bug split from DRIVERS-2830: driver omits container metadata when FaaS also present; MongoDB Handshake spec violation.
Switching to thread-safe pseudo-random number generator API; internal thread safety fix, no spec involvement.
Shrinking large stream buffers when client returned to pool; performance/memory optimization, no spec rule involved.
SChannel X509 auth fails if server doesn't support SHA1; Windows TLS library limitation, no specific spec rule violated.
Restoring cmake_policy in GenerateUninstaller.cmake; CMake build system fix, no spec involvement.
Uninstall batch script returns non-zero exit due to self-deletion; packaging bug, no spec involvement.
Windows GetTickCount64 resolution 10-16ms causes command duration to occasionally be zero; platform limitation, not a spec rule.
Header hygiene and verification improvements; internal code organization, no spec involvement.
createIndexes uses wrong command function: write concern not inherited from collection, writeConcernError not surfaced as failure.
Auth spec says saslSupportedMechs only in initial handshake; driver includes it in all subsequent monitoring hello commands.
mongoc_client_reset unsafely clears shared topology session pool for pooled clients; internal thread safety, no spec rule.
Closed change stream (cursor ID 0) triggers resume attempt causing server error; Go driver correctly stops on cursor ID 0.
Bulk write let option silently dropped when document exceeds ~91 bytes; CRUD spec requires let be included in command.
Adding TLS 1.3 support in Windows SChannel; new feature addition, no existing spec rule violated.
MLIB_IS_EMPTY macro fails on function macros taking arguments; internal C preprocessor bug, no spec involvement.

Check Cyrus SASL username length; empty description, security CVE fix, insufficient detail for spec classification.
